prompt: Minimal flat icon illustration. A calendar with checkmarks on multiple days showing a streak/habit, or a circular arrow showing daily repetition/consistency. Simple loop/cycle icon with a small checkmark. Clean white background. Simple geometric shapes, bold outlines, warm amber brown color (#92400e). Icon design style, no text, no labels, flat 2D design. Centered composition with lots of white space.
negative_prompt: photography, realistic, 3D, shadows, complex gradients, text, labels, human figure, complex background, clutter, colorful rainbow palette, dark background
